---
name: lead-dossier
description: "Build a deep research dossier on a single prospect or account before a sales call. Pulls public signals, news, hiring, tech stack, and recent statements into a one-page brief. Use when asked to 'research this lead', 'build a dossier', 'pre-call brief', 'who is this prospect', 'what should I know about <company>'."
argument-hint: "Company domain or LinkedIn URL"
---

# Lead Dossier (adapter)

Source skill: [`lead-dossier/`](../../../lead-dossier/) — scripts in
[`lead-dossier/scripts/`](../../../lead-dossier/scripts/), reference templates
in [`lead-dossier/references/`](../../../lead-dossier/references/).

## When to use

- Pre-call research for an inbound demo or outbound discovery
- Account expansion: identifying triggers and stakeholders
- Pairing with [`sales-playbook`](../sales-playbook/SKILL.md) for value pricing

See [`lead-dossier/SKILL.md`](../../../lead-dossier/SKILL.md) for full flow.
